docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LATHAN, CHARLENE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY DENTAL CAL COAST CREDIT SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL SENT TO CAL COAST CREDIT SERVICE RETURNED SIGNED
CERT MAIL SENT TO CITY DENTAL RETURNED SIGNED
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,511.05 FILED BY CITY DENTAL CAL COAST CREDIT SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LATHAN, CHARLENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF LATHAN, CHARLENE

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-29-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-07-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT CAL COAST CREDIT SERVICE FAILED TO APPEAR. PLAINTIFF DISMISSED DEFENDANT CITY DENTAL AS A DEFENDANT AND CAL COAST CREDIT SERVICE WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
AS TO DEFT'S CLAIM: SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMT OF $850. CONTD TO 10/7/05 @ 10 AM. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTD IN 6 MONTH INTERVALS
UNTIL BALANCE PAID IN FULL AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF A MINIMUM OF $25 PER MONTH
BEGINNING ON 5/1/05 & ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY
COURT ORDERED DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO: CAL COAST CREDIT SERVICE
COURT ORDERED DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT CITY DENTAL

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-07-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-07-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT ON PAYMENTS. IF NO APPEARANCES, CONTINUED FOR A FINAL PROGRESS REPORT WHERE THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-07-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-30-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 6/30/06 AT 10:00 A.M. FOR PROGRESS REPORT. CONTINUE FOR ONE ADDITIONAL PROGRESS REPORT AFTER 6/30/06 AND IF NO APPEARANCES, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-30-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-01-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUE FOR FINAL PROGRESS REPORT TO 12/1/06 AT 10:00 A.M. IF NO APPEARANCE, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAL COAST CREDIT SERVICE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT BY THE PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LATHAN, CHARLENE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT OF THE PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED
